# Dev's Foundation

Dev's Foundation is the first multi-agent consensus method with a shared brain.

Core public method:
- Git as synchronization middleware.
- Markdown as durable, human-readable memory.
- One master brain plus local brains.
- Asynchronous inbox/outbox communication.
- Consensus before major execution.
- Local-only secrets.
- Vendor-agnostic AI model participation.

Canonical repository:
https://github.com/Devs-Foundation/multi-agent-consensus-method

Website:
https://devs.foundation/
